onboarding.title: Welcome to SEO Tracker
onboarding.subtitle: Track keywords, pages, backlinks, competitors, and technical issues
onboarding.sampleDataDescription: We've added 3 pages, 3 keywords, 2 backlinks, 2 competitors, and 2 technical issues as examples.

steps.title: Track keywords
steps.description: Monitor keyword positions, search volume, and difficulty. See how rankings change over time.

steps.title: Manage pages & issues
steps.description: Track your content pages through their lifecycle and flag technical SEO issues by priority.

steps.title: Use your AI agent
steps.description: Ask your agent to add keywords, log backlinks, or report on your SEO performance.

reference.overview: A comprehensive SEO monitoring tool for tracking keyword rankings, page performance, backlink profiles, competitor analysis, and technical issues.

concepts.name: Keywords
concepts.description: Search terms you're targeting — track position, volume, difficulty, and search intent.

concepts.name: Pages
concepts.description: Your content pages with status tracking (planned, drafting, published) and performance metrics.

concepts.name: Backlinks
concepts.description: Incoming links from external sites — track source, anchor text, link type, and domain authority.

concepts.name: Competitors
concepts.description: Competing domains with estimated traffic, authority scores, and top keywords.

concepts.name: Issues
concepts.description: Technical SEO problems (speed, mobile, indexing, security) prioritized by severity.

prompts: Add a keyword: 'product management tool', search volume 2400, difficulty 45
Show all keywords with position worse than 20
Create an issue: slow page load on /blog, priority high, type speed
List all backlinks from domain authority above 50
tips: Keywords link to pages — set the pageId field to associate a keyword with its target page
Track position changes by updating the position field and noting the previousPosition
Issues support a status workflow: open → in-progress → resolved

keywords.title: No keywords tracked yet
keywords.description: Start by adding the keywords you want to rank for. Your AI agent can help you build your keyword list.
keywords.suggestedPrompt: Add these keywords: 'project management tool' (volume 5400), 'team collaboration software' (volume 3200)
